sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπαύγασμα

- Transliteration: Apaugasma

- Phonetic: ap-ow'-gas-mah

- Definition:

1. reflected brightness

a. of Christ in that he perfectly reflects the majesty of God

2. effulgence

a. shining forth, of a light coming from a luminous body (Vine)

b. out-raying (Vincent)

- Origin: from a compound of G575 and G826

- TDNT entry: 09:28,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From a compound of G575 and G826; an off flash that is effulgence: - brightness.
